title: Bridge Essay: Enhancing Attention by Synchronizing Respiration and Fingertip Pressure: A Pilot

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through Enhancing, Attention, by, Synchronizing, Respiration.

**Enhancing Attention by Synchronizing Respiration and Fingertip Pressure: A Pilot Study Using Functional Near-Infrared Spectroscopy.** — Front Neurosci. PMID: 31780888. DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2019.01209. Sustained attention is afundamental ability ensuring effective cognitive processing and can be enhanced by meditation practice. However, keeping afocused meditative state is challenging for novices because involuntary mind-wandering frequently occurs during their practice. Inspired by the potential of force-control tasks in invoking internal somatic attention, we proposed ahaptics-assisted meditation (HAM) to help reduce mind-wandering and enhance attention.
